mapper.update: UPDATE user SET dailyQuota = #{dailyQuota}, quotaResetDate = #{today}, updateTime = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId} AND isDelete = 0 AND (quotaResetDate IS NULL OR quotaResetDate != #{today})
UPDATE user SET dailyQuota = #{dailyQuota}, quotaResetDate = #{today}, updateTime = NOW() WHERE isDelete = 0 AND (quotaResetDate IS NULL OR quotaResetDate != #{today})
UPDATE user SET bonusQuota = COALESCE(bonusQuota, 0) + #{amount}, updateTime = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId} AND isDelete = 0
